architecture: 1 architect + 11 page sub-agents + 1 synthesizer, all sonnet-4.6
methodology: size-based estimate based on v0.2 panel architecture
quality_notes: Sampled quickstart, authentication, and manifest schema pages show uneven density, including long schema/reference content, so the 6.5K input tokens per page-sub-agent is a conservative generic-panel average. Because v0.2 lacks model routing, cache-aware structuring, compression, and effort governance, this estimate prices all architect, audit, and synthesis work at Sonnet 4.6 rates with verbose per-page verdicts.
